title: Quitting Your Job Could Cost You $14,000
hook: Your 401k match is already in your account — but quit too soon and your company takes it all back. That's the vesting trap most workers never see coming.
angle: Most employees think their employer's 401k match is theirs the moment it hits the account — but vesting schedules mean you could have zero legal claim to it for years, and 1 in 3 workers quit before fully vesting
audience: Anyone with a 401k who has changed jobs or is thinking about it, especially workers in their 20s-40s
key_numbers: 1 in 3 workers quits before fully vesting
